entries.title: Jobs to Be Done
entries.author: Christensen Institute
entries.scope: Frame user progress and switching behavior before feature design.
claims_supported: Product work should start from the progress a user is trying to make.
entries.actionable_rule: Every substantial task packet names the user, job, pain evidence, and business value.

entries.title: Documenting architecture decisions
entries.author: Michael Nygard
entries.scope: Preserve consequential design decisions and their tradeoffs.
claims_supported: Short ADRs prevent repeatedly reopening settled decisions.

entries.title: Property-based testing
entries.author: Hypothesis
entries.scope: Generate broad input families for invariants and edge cases.
claims_supported: Invariants need generated edge cases in addition to examples.
entries.actionable_rule: Security and evidence contracts receive malformed and boundary-input tests.

entries.title: Timeouts, retries, and backoff with jitter
entries.author: Amazon Web Services
entries.scope: Bound retries and prevent retry amplification.
claims_supported: Retries require timeouts, backoff, and idempotency.
entries.actionable_rule: External writes use bounded retries and revision-aware idempotency keys.

entries.title: Application Security Verification Standard
entries.author: OWASP Foundation
entries.scope: Authentication, sessions, validation, and data protection.
claims_supported: Security-sensitive changes need explicit verification requirements.
entries.actionable_rule: Auth, tenant, credential, and external-side-effect changes are high or critical risk.

entries.title: Web Vitals
entries.author: Google
claims_supported: Performance should be measured from user-visible outcomes.
entries.actionable_rule: Reject unexplained p95 regressions above 10 percent.

entries.title: AI Risk Management Framework
entries.author: NIST
entries.scope: Govern, map, measure, and manage AI risks.
claims_supported: AI behavior needs measured controls and documented limitations.
entries.actionable_rule: Version evaluations and report grounding, safety, fallback, latency, and cost.

entries.title: Web Content Accessibility Guidelines 2.2
entries.author: W3C
claims_supported: Product flows need keyboard, focus, contrast, and semantic checks.
entries.actionable_rule: Verify keyboard access, labels, focus, and reduced motion.

entries.title: Fair Housing Act overview
entries.author: U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development
entries.scope: U.S. protected classes and prohibited housing discrimination.
claims_supported: Outreach must not target, steer, or infer protected classes.
entries.actionable_rule: Every outbound artifact is fail-closed and re-linted after edits.
